title: Team Protocols
description: Typed requests, request ids, and response matching turn team chat into a protocol.

steps.content: Ask the reviewer agent for a plan before it edits anything.
steps.annotation: The lead needs a structured plan request, not free-form chat.
The protocol records a pending request with a request_id.
ProtocolState keeps the request open until a matching response arrives.
The message is typed so the teammate knows how to handle it.
The teammate responds with the same request_id.
The lead can correlate the reply with the exact request.
The lead explicitly approves the plan before work proceeds.
